spec.rawSql:
SELECT time AS time, err::text AS text
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE err > 0 AND $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time;

SELECT time AS time, warn::text AS text
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE warn > 0 AND $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time;

SELECT time AS time, array_to_string(healed_fields, ', ') AS text
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE cardinality(healed_fields) > 0 AND $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time;

SELECT time AS time, message AS text
FROM event_logs
WHERE level IN ('FD', 'critical') AND $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time;

SELECT time AS time, message AS text
FROM event_logs
WHERE level IN ('critical') AND $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time;

SELECT time, ABS(rpm) AS rpm
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  time,
  mot_c  AS "Motor (°C)",
  igbt_c AS "IGBT (°C)"
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time;

SELECT time, mode
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT time, level, node, message, fields
FROM event_logs
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time DESC;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT err, warn
  FROM telemetry_records
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  ORDER BY time DESC
  LIMIT 1
)

SELECT 'error' AS type, d.bit AS bit_number, d.name, d.description
FROM err_bit_definitions d, latest l
WHERE (l.err & (1 << d.bit)) > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT 'warning' AS type, d.bit AS bit_number, d.name, d.description
FROM warn_bit_definitions d, latest l
WHERE (l.warn & (1 << d.bit)) > 0

UNION ALL

-- "All clear" row: appears only when a frame exists but no fault bits are set
SELECT 'ok' AS type,
       NULL::smallint AS bit_number,
       'No active faults' AS name,
       'All systems normal' AS description
FROM latest l
WHERE COALESCE(l.err, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(l.warn, 0) = 0;

SELECT l_regen, l_err, l_warn, l_ok, l_pump, drive_ena
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT time, healed_fields
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE cardinality(healed_fields) > 0
AND $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time DESC;

SELECT count(*) AS total_healed_frames
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE cardinality(healed_fields) > 0
AND $__timeFilter(time);

spec.description:
Total heal count during the selected timeframe.

rpm, amp, volt, trq, mode, igbt_c, mot_c, time
spec.title: Total Heal Count

spec.rawSql:
SELECT count(*) AS error FROM event_logs
WHERE level = 'error' AND $__timeFilter(time);

SELECT count(*) AS error FROM event_logs
WHERE level = 'critical' AND $__timeFilter(time);

SELECT count(*) AS error FROM event_logs
WHERE level = 'FD' AND $__timeFilter(time);

SELECT time, rpm
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time;

SELECT count(*) AS error FROM event_logs
WHERE level = 'warn' AND $__timeFilter(time);

spec.description:
Total individual null count during the selected timeframe.

err, warn, l_regen, l_err, l_warn, l_ok, l_pump, drive_ena
spec.title: Total Null Count

spec.rawSql:
SELECT time, volt
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  time,
  volt AS "Voltage (V)",
  amp  AS "Current (A)"
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time;

SELECT time, amp
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT time, trq
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT time, trq AS "Torque (N·m)"
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time;

SELECT time, mot_c
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT time, igbt_c
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;
